title: [Abuse] Warning notice: www[dot]investexp[dot]de
text: The Financial Market Authority (FMA) Liechtenstein points out that the operators of the following websites do not have a special legal authorization from the FMA and are not allowed to offer financial services requiring a special legal authorization.   www[dot]investexp[dot]de www[dot]finanzexp[dot]de www[dot]beexp[dot]de www[dot]europexp[dot]de  www[dot]bexstock[dot]com   In addition, the logo of the FMA is inadmissibly used in contractual documents, thus creating the false appearance of a supervision by the FMA.
